examples: Transplant the seedlings into peaty soil.
He transplanted the seedlings into peaty soil.
Coffee growers had beans roasted on the bush when the peaty soil caught fire.
The Triple Smoke is a tasty American single malt whiskey with a golden colour and a peaty butterscotch flavour.
Some people prefer a dry and peaty Islay, others the sweetness of a Speyside or the depth of a Campbeltown.
